summary: Full frontend testing of RODDOS dark theme redesign. All 9 test scenarios passed successfully.

issues: data-testid is 'chat-toggle-btn' not 'chat-float-btn' — minor naming inconsistency

context_for_next_testing_agent: RODDOS dark redesign fully working. Login: dark bg rgb(18,18,18), RODDOS logo+radar icon, cyan→green gradient 'Ingresar' button, demo buttons 'Contabilidad'/'Compras'. Dashboard: dark bg, 4 KPI cards (cyan/red/green/amber borders), AreaChart with cyan/red lines, dark tables. Sidebar: dark, RODDOS logo, cyan active item. AI Chat: .chat-float-btn with data-testid='chat-toggle-btn' (note: NOT 'chat-float-btn'). Proactive alerts showing. Navigation to /facturacion-venta and /facturacion-compra works. Logout (data-testid='logout-btn') returns to /login.
